content.en:
Earth.

Ye Tian returned here, and then he began to study Hamon's soul memory in Kunlun Mountain.

This is a cultivator from Chaos, even if he doesn't enter the chaos stream, his soul memory is also a priceless treasure for Ye Tian!

Perhaps, he could learn some secrets from Harmon's memories.

"Let's start absorbing the memories!"

Ye Tian muttered.

With Ye Tian's powerful soul, he quickly absorbed and digested Hamon's memory fragments one by one.

At this moment, Ye Tian was extremely shocked.

Although these memory fragments did not include many of the core secrets, those core secrets were directly annihilated due to the oath, so the memory fragments he obtained were only minor memories.

But even so, the knowledge or secrets contained in it were enough to shock Ye Tian.

"The Hidden God Organization!"

This is the name of Hamon's organization, and Hamon is only a peripheral member of this organization, but he has a high status as a peripheral member, his strength is not weak, and he has a strong elder, so he has the opportunity to be reborn in this universe.

In addition, the secrets of this universe have not spread in the chaos, and it is not easy to transmit news in the chaos, so Hamon's words before were completely deceiving him.

The person who really knows the secrets of the universe is actually the Tibetan God Organization.

As for how the Tibetan God Organization planned and how Hamon was reincarnated into this universe, Ye Tian did not find out these secrets, obviously these secrets were within the scope of the oath or could not be absorbed when he was absorbing his memory.

"The secrets of the Tibetan God Organization, it's useless for me to know now, if I can't get rid of it, I won't be able to leave the universe, so these secrets are of no use to me now!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

And the information that is really useful to Ye Tian is-

The secret realm of the Tibetan God Organization!

This wasn't really a secret, so Harmon had it in his memory.

Harmon has just been reincarnated, but he is actually very weak, so it takes a certain amount of time to develop, and he has been in this universe for 10,000 years.

It only took 10,000 years to cultivate to the Domination Realm, even if he had previous memories and a powerful inheritance, he would not be able to cultivate to this realm if he didn't have enough resources.

And the secret realm is the biggest help to help Hamon quickly improve his strength, and it is also the opportunity given by the Tibetan God Organization to Hamon and some other reincarnated members.

Otherwise, Harmon has nothing, and is directly reincarnated in this universe, how can he develop? You can't work hard to earn resources by yourself, in that case, the cultivation speed is slow and not to mention, if you encounter any danger and fall in this universe in advance, then you will really fall, and you won't even be able to resurrect.

Ye Tian didn't know what the specific plan of the Tibetan God Organization was, but those members who dared to enter the universe had some backgrounds, otherwise they wouldn't have this opportunity.

Therefore, they naturally didn't want these people to fall into the universe, so they created a lot of secret realms in advance, placed them at the edge of the universe, and waited for the universe to expand and swallow these secret realms into it.

And these secret realms are very special, even the supremes of the universe are difficult to discover them.

Of course, once discovered, there is no way to crack the secret realm formation, and there is no way to enter the secret realm.

And there is such a secret realm on the earth, and the entrance is in the underground space of Kunlun Mountain.

"It turns out that the underground space where the World Tree was discovered was the entrance to the secret realm, no wonder the small earth can give birth to the World Tree, presumably because of the secret realm. If I don't absorb Hamon's memory, even if I turn Kunlun Mountain upside down, I won't be able to find that secret realm!"

Ye Tiandao.

In addition to this secret realm, what interests Ye Tian the most is the Chaos Divine Power!

Chaos Divine Power is a Divine Power that surpasses the Great Divine Power, even in Chaos, Chaos Divine Power is extremely rare, and few people can practice a Chaos Divine Power.

For example, Hamon is very strong and has a good talent, but he is not qualified to cultivate a Chaos Divine Power, even if he has a Chaos Divine Power Technique, he can't practice it.

If you want to cultivate a Chaos Divine Power, you must first have an innate origin thing and the corresponding super god-level talent, so that you can have the qualification to cultivate.

However, cultivating a Chaos Divine Power is too difficult and difficult, and even if the conditions are met, it will take too long to comprehend and cultivate.

Innate Origin is rare in chaos, but not so rare in the universe.

Of course, some of the supreme treasures in the universe that contain the origin are not innate origin things, and many things seem to have a little relationship with the origin, but they are not innate origin things at all.

According to Hamon's memory, there are not many things in the universe that can be called innate origin, and one of them is the well of origin!

Using the Well of Origin as an innate origin thing, coupled with a Chaos Divine Power with a high degree of fit, there is hope to condense the prototype of Chaos Divine Power.

Yes, it is only a rudiment, and if you really want to practice a chaotic supernatural power, you must at least have the cultivation of the Heavenly Mandate Realm, otherwise it can only be regarded as a rudiment.

In the midst of chaos, once the powerhouse of the Earth Venerable Realm has cultivated into a rudimentary form of Chaos Divine Power, he is almost invincible in the Earth Venerable Realm, and is even expected to fight with the powerhouses of the Heavenly Mandate Realm, and even defeat the weaker Heavenly Mandate Realm powerhouses!

"Chaos Powers!!"

Ye Tian was excited, because he had cultivation qualifications!

He possessed a super-god-level space-time talent, and he also obtained the Well of Origin, and all the fragments of the Well of Origin were integrated into his vision of the Ancient Well.

In this way, once he obtains a time or space-type Chaos Divine Power, he can practice into a rudimentary Chaos Divine Power, and his combat effectiveness will undergo a huge qualitative change.

But immediately, Ye Tian sighed again: "The Chaos Divine Power is too precious, even Hamon has only heard of it, but he has never seen it. Whether the Tibetan God Organization has specific chaotic supernatural powers, Hamon is not clear. "

"Forget it, the Chaos Divine Power is very rare, even in the chaos it is difficult to obtain, I am in the universe, why force it. At present, I have a general understanding of the basic situation, and the real plan to carry out the Dual Universe Transcendence Plan should be the Tibetan God Organization. Those supremes of the Twelve Universe Epochs should cooperate with the Tibetan God Organization, but the Supremes of the Twelve Cosmic Ages definitely don't know about the Tibetan God Organization. The Tibetan God Organization is actually using the Tibetan God Organization, but one thing is true, once the dual universes are fused, the difficulty of detachment does become smaller, but if you are detached in that way, the potential to become a transcendent person is too small and too small! Unless after the fusion of the two universes, a large universe is formed, and then a transcendent person is detached from the big universe, then the transcendent person who becomes a transcendent will be against the sky. But it's too hard and too hard to get out of the big universe......!

Ye Tian knew from Hammon's memory that the great universe seemed to be able to accommodate the powerhouses of the Heavenly Mandate Realm!

But as for whether it is or not, Ye Tian is not very clear.

At least from the current situation, it can be inferred that the Tibetan God Organization intends to cultivate some weakened versions of the detached, no matter how garbage the detached are, there is hope to surpass the realm of the Mandate of Heaven.

Therefore, once a few or more transcendents are born, the strength of the Tibetan God Organization will inevitably skyrocket.

And according to Ye Tian's calculations, the Tibetan God Organization may also want to cultivate a big universe!

As for what to do when cultivating the Great Universe, Ye Tian didn't know, but it was definitely beneficial to the Tibetan God Organization.

It's a pity that Harmon doesn't have it in his memory, and maybe Harmon doesn't know this secret.

"Originally, I thought it would be difficult to progress quickly, and the Twin Universe Detachment didn't know what really started. If you want to make rapid progress, you may be able to rely on this secret place on Earth!"

Ye Tiandao.
